name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi

Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER), Puducherry

Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹1 lakh/semester for General/OBC. Income-based remission applies: families with annual income below ₹1 lakh pay no tuition (full waiver); ₹1–5 lakh income gets a two-thirds tuition waiver; SC/ST/PwD students get full tuition exemption. The waiver is not automatic — claim it at JoSAA counselling and re-submit an income certificate each year.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹1 lakh/semester for General/OBC. Income-based remission applies: families with annual income below ₹1 lakh pay no tuition (full waiver); ₹1–5 lakh income gets a two-thirds tuition waiver; SC/ST/PwD students get full tuition exemption. The waiver is not automatic — claim it at JoSAA counselling and re-submit an income certificate each year.

feesNote: Tuition is ~₹1 lakh/semester for General/OBC. Income-based remission applies: families with annual income below ₹1 lakh pay no tuition (full waiver); ₹1–5 lakh income gets a two-thirds tuition waiver; SC/ST/PwD students get full tuition exemption. name: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹1 lakh/semester for General/OBC. Income-based remission applies: families with annual income below ₹1 lakh pay no tuition (full waiver); ₹1–5 lakh income gets a two-thirds tuition waiver; SC/ST/PwD students get full tuition exemption. The waiver is not automatic — claim it at JoSAA counselling and re-submit an income certificate each year.

name: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹62,500/semester (~₹1.25 lakh/year) for General/OBC. Income-based remission for Open/EWS/OBC-NCL students: family income below ₹1 lakh gets full tuition waiver; ₹1–5 lakh gets a two-thirds tuition waiver. SC/ST/PwD students are exempt from tuition. A fresh family income certificate must be submitted each year.

name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Surathkal (NITK Surathkal)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹62,500/semester (~₹1.25 lakh/year) for General/OBC. Income-based remission for Open/EWS/OBC-NCL students: family income below ₹1 lakh gets full tuition waiver; ₹1–5 lakh gets a two-thirds tuition waiver. SC/ST/PwD students are exempt from tuition. A fresh family income certificate must be submitted each year.

name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
feesNote: Tuition is ~₹62,500/semester (~₹1.25 lakh/year) for General/OBC. Income-based remission for Open/EWS/OBC-NCL students: family income below ₹1 lakh gets full tuition waiver; ₹1–5 lakh gets a two-thirds tuition waiver. SC/ST/PwD students are exempt from tuition. A fresh family income certificate must be submitted each year.

name: International Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad (IIIT Hyderabad)
feesNote: Tuition ~₹4.5 lakh/year (rising ~₹5,000 each year; hostel & mess ~₹1 lakh/year extra). No central income-based government tuition waiver, but the alumni-funded IIITH Special Financial Assistance Scheme (ISFAS) gives guaranteed full tuition support to admitted students with family income below ~₹8 lakh/year, backed by a guaranteed SBI Scholar education loan. Confirm current details on the official admissions site.
entranceRequired: JEE Main / IIIT-H UGEE (institute's own entrance channels)

name: Delhi Technological University (DTU)
feesNote: Annual fee ~₹1.9–2 lakh (base tuition ~₹61,300 plus welfare/facilities charges; hostel billed separately). A Delhi state-government university, so well below private rates. Check for EWS/SC/ST fee concessions and Delhi-government scholarships on the official site.

name: COEP Technological University (College of Engineering, Pune)
feesNote: Open-category fee ~₹1.42–1.63 lakh/year. As a state institution, reserved-category fees are far lower — OBC ~₹45,000–50,000/year and SC/ST ~₹3,500–4,000/year. Maharashtra EBC and TFWS (tuition-fee-waiver) schemes can further reduce fees for low-income families; verify eligibility on the official site.

name: Jadavpur University, Kolkata
feesNote: Among the most affordable engineering programmes in India, as it is a West Bengal state-government university. Non-IT B.E. branches cost only a few thousand rupees a year (~₹2,400–3,000/year; ~₹10,000–12,000 for the full course), while IT/CSE is higher at ~₹29,900/year (~₹1.2 lakh for four years). Merit-cum-means aid (e.g. Swami Vivekananda scholarship) and fee concessions are available for low-income students.

name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
feesNote: High-cost private (deemed) university — tuition ~₹2.75–2.92 lakh/semester (~₹5.5–5.85 lakh/year), rising ~5% annually; hostel & mess extra. No income-based government waiver applies, but BITS offers Merit and Merit-cum-Need (MCN) scholarships covering 10–100% of tuition for a sizeable share of admitted students.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT Vellore)
feesNote: B.Tech tuition is tiered by VITEEE rank/fee category, roughly ₹1.98–3.98 lakh/year; hostel & mess extra. VIT's GV School Development Programme (GVSDP) gives merit scholarships to top rankers.

name: Manipal Institute of Technology (MIT Manipal)
feesNote: B.Tech tuition ~₹3.8–4.3 lakh/year depending on branch; hostel & mess extra. Admission via MET (Manipal Entrance Test). MAHE offers a limited number of merit scholarships.

name: University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE), Bengaluru
feesNote: State government college under Bangalore University — open-category fee ~₹45,000–70,000/year; reserved-category and KCET government-quota seats cost far less. Confirm the current fee on the official site.
entranceRequired: KCET (Karnataka CET); also admits via COMEDK

name: Veermata Jijabai Technological Institute (VJTI), Mumbai
feesNote: Government-aided autonomous institute — open-category B.Tech fee ~₹83,000–1,05,000/year; reserved-category and Maharashtra EBC/TFWS waivers cut this substantially. Admission mainly via MHT-CET, with a JEE Main quota too. Confirm the current fee on the official site.
entranceRequired: MHT-CET (also admits a JEE Main quota)
